name: Spiced Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the first eight ingredients into a small bowl.
2. Whisk sugar and eggs until a light lemon color; stir in vanilla.
3. Sift the dry ingredients over the egg mixture, then fold in until the dough is just combined.
4. Follow steps 3 and 4 in Lemon- Anise Biscotti.
VARIATIONS: Macerate 1/4 cup currants (or chopped raisins or dates) with 1/4 cup brandy or marsala for at least 1 hour. Drain and fold into the dough in step 2, adding a teaspoon or so of the macerating liquid to the dough.
